---
title: "TDM23_skims_omx_to_csv"
author: "Conor Gately"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Process CTPS model skims from TDM23 for UrbanSim input format

# 1 - Setup

```{r, setup, include=FALSE}

options(scipen=999)
sun <- function(x){sort(unique(x))}

pacman::p_load(
  sf,
  data.table,
  tidyverse,
  stringr
)

#devtools::install_github('gregmacfarlane/omxr')
library(omxr)
# devtools::install_github('MAPC/mapcdatakeys')
library(mapcdatakeys)

# Paths
if (grepl('VM',Sys.info()[['nodename']])){
  base <- '//data-sync/Public/DataServices'
} else {
  base <- 'S:/Network Shares/K Drive/DataServices'
}

data_path <- file.path(base,'Projects/Current_Projects/Environment/EEA_MLCA/Data/Task_4')

scen <- 'Scenario_2'

skim_path <- file.path(data_path,scen,'Skims')
# skim_path <- 'C:/Users/gately/Desktop/Skims'
dir.create(skim_path, showWarnings = F)

knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = data_path)

```

# 2 - File Paths

```{r}

if(scen == 'Scenario_1') {
  base_prefix <- '2019_NoBusLane_HRT-'
  plan_prefix <- '2050plan_NoBusLane_HRT-'
}

if(scen == 'Scenario_2') {
  base_prefix <- 'Base'
  int_prefix <- '2024_Draft20260414'
  plan_prefix <- '2050plan'
}

if(scen == 'Scenario_3') {
  base_prefix <- ''
  plan_prefix <- ''
}

if(scen == 'Scenario_4') {
  base_prefix <- ''
  plan_prefix <- ''
}

filenames <- c(
  # file.path(
  # skim_path,
  # base_prefix,
  # c('hwy_am.omx', 'tw_am.omx', 'ta_am.omx'))
# ,
file.path(
  skim_path,
  int_prefix,
  c('hwy_am.omx', 'tw_am.omx', 'ta_am.omx'))
# ,
# file.path(
#   skim_path,
#   plan_prefix,
#   c('hwy_am.omx', 'tw_am.omx', 'ta_am.omx')
# )
)

```

# 3 - Convert OMX files to CSV

```{r}

dx <- readRDS(paste0(skim_path,'/TDM23_TAZ_OD_Pairs.rds'))

  for (fname in filenames) {
    vars <- list_omx(fname)$Matrices$name
    rows <- list_omx(fname)$Rows
    cols <- list_omx(fname)$Columns
    taz_seq <- sort(unique(dx$from_zone_id))
    dx <- readRDS(paste0(skim_path,'/TDM23_TAZ_OD_Pairs.rds'))
    for (v in vars) {
      d1 <- as.data.table(read_omx(fname, v))
      setnames(d1,paste0('V',taz_seq))
      d1[, from_zone_id := taz_seq]
      m1 <-
        melt.data.table(d1, id.vars = 'from_zone_id', variable.name = 'to_zone_id')
      setnames(m1, 'value', v)
      vs <- names(m1)[3]
      m1[get(vs) < 0, 3] <- 0
      m1[, to_zone_id := as.integer(gsub('V', '', to_zone_id))]
      setkey(m1, from_zone_id,to_zone_id)
      dx <- m1[dx]
    }
    
    dx <- dx[, c('from_zone_id', 'to_zone_id', vars), with = F]
    dx[is.na(dx)] <- 9999999
    dx[dx < 0] <- 0
    fout <- gsub('omx$','csv',fname)
    fwrite(dx, fout)
    rm(fout, d1, m1)
    gc()
    
  }

```

# 4 - Format skims for UrbanSim

```{r}

zid <- fread(paste0(skim_path,'/swm_zone_ids.csv'))

# for (yr in c(base_prefix, plan_prefix)) {
for (yr in c(plan_prefix)) {    
  
    # SOV / Passenger vehicle
    hwy <- fread(file.path(skim_path, yr, 'hwy_am.csv'))
    hwy[, sov_am_totcost := da_time / 60 * 18.50 + da_toll]
    hwy <- hwy[, .(from_zone_id, to_zone_id, sov_am_totcost)]
    setkey(hwy, from_zone_id, to_zone_id)
    
    # Walk-access transit
    wat <- fread(file.path(skim_path, yr, 'tw_am.csv'))
    wat[, wat_am_totcost := Fare + ivtt / 60 * 18.50 + (iwait + walk + xwait) /
        60 * 18.5 * 3]
    wat <- wat[, .(from_zone_id, to_zone_id, wat_am_totcost)]
    setkey(wat, from_zone_id, to_zone_id)
    
    # Drive-access transit
    dat <- fread(file.path(skim_path, yr, 'ta_am.csv'))
    dat[, dat_am_totcost := Fare + auto_cost + ivtt / 60 * 18.50 + (iwait + walk + xwait) /
        60 * 18.5 * 3]
    dat <- dat[, .(from_zone_id, to_zone_id, dat_am_totcost)]
    setkey(dat, from_zone_id, to_zone_id)
    
    # Merge all modes
    skim <- hwy[wat][dat]
    skim[wat_am_totcost == 0, wat_am_totcost := 9999999][dat_am_totcost ==0, dat_am_totcost := 9999999]
    saveRDS(skim, file.path(skim_path,yr,paste0(yr, '_skims_combined.rds')))
    
    # Subset to MAPC zones
    mapc <- skim[(from_zone_id <= 2667 |
                  from_zone_id == 3000) & (to_zone_id <= 2667 | to_zone_id == 3000)]
    mapc[, travel_time := 1]
    
    # Subset to SWM zones
    sid <- skim[, sun(from_zone_id)]
    drops <- sid[!sid %in% zid$zone_id]
    swm <- skim[!from_zone_id %in% drops & !to_zone_id %in% drops]
    swm[,travel_time:=1]
    
    # Export
    fwrite(mapc, file.path(skim_path,yr,
           paste0('mapcm_skims_', yr, '.csv')))
    fwrite(swm, file.path(skim_path,yr,
           paste0('swm_skims_', yr, '.csv')))
    
}

```
